title: rosa pouzinii subsp. nonhispida
intro: Rosa pouzinii subsp. nonhispida is a subspecies of wild rose that is native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its fragrant pink flowers and thornless stems. The medicinal properties of Rosa pouzinii subsp. nonhispida include its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Rosa pouzinii subsp. nonhispida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
